programme.title: Masterchef Australia Season 08 - Judge's Auditions - Day One
programme.desc: Each contestant has 60 minutes to produce their signature dish. If our three all like the dish, then the contestant receives an apron and goes straight into the MasterChef competition.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia Season 08 - Judge's Auditions - Day Two: Favourite things
programme.desc: It’s day two of the Judges Auditions and 11 contestants return for a second chance to show the judges they deserve an apron and a place in the MasterChef Top 24 of 2016.

programme.title: The Competition
programme.desc: Lauren Mauldin (Thora Birch) is a strong-willed but misguided young woman who encourages her millions of blog followers to apply her scientific formula to all romantic relationships in order to prevent heartache. If you follow her six-month PIG Theory, you will always have the upper hand and you will never be cheated on! Her plan works smoothly until her sister Gena introduces her to the charming and undefeated womens' advocate attorney, Calvin Chesney (Chris Klein). Calvin refuses to believe human connections can be so easily categorised. He challenges Lauren to a competition to prove her theory wrong.

programme.title: My Life as a Courgette
programme.desc: After his abusive mother’s sudden death, Courgette is befriended by police officer Raymond, who accompanies him to the orphanage. At first Courgette struggles to find his place in this strange environment. Yet with Raymond’s help and his new friends, he eventually learns to trust, and finds love.

programme.title: Girl Most Likely
programme.desc: Kristen Wiig stars as Imogene, once a promising young New York playwright whose promise has fizzled, thanks to a crisis of confidence. Heavily in denial about being dumped by her society boyfriend, Imogene uses her skill for drama to stage an elaborate fake suicide as an appeal for his sympathy. But her attempt backfires when she's put into the custody of Zelda, her estranged gambling addict mother, and must return home with her to the Jersey shore. Desperate to get back to her Manhattan circle of so- called friends, Imogene must finally deal with her family, including her unique brother...

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: When Steve Dallas (Owen Wilson), a womanizing local weatherman, hears that his off-the-grid best friend Ben Baker (Zach Galifianakis) has lost his estranged father, the two return to Ben's childhood home to discover Ben has inherited the family fortune leaving the ill-equipped duo to battle Ben's formidable sister (Amy Poehler) and deal with his father's gorgeous 25-year-old widow (Laura Ramsey).

programme.title: Date & Switch
programme.desc: High school seniors Michael and Matty have been best friends since 3rd grade. Still virgins, they make a pact to help each other "score" before Senior Prom - but their mission suddenly takes an unexpected turn when Matty announces that he's gay.

programme.title: The Last Great Tuskers - Episode 3
programme.desc: In Southern Africa, Zimbabwe is home to some of the world’s most magnificent elephants. These are the Great Tuskers. But this unique tusker gene pool is diminishing each year…dwindling forever to poaching and unethical trophy hunting. Now, for the first time ever, in an attempt to hold on to these great animals, The Zimbabwe National Parks Authority is allowing a dedicated team to attempt to collar and monitor three great tuskers, from three different Zimbabwean national parks. (S1, Ep3)

programme.title: Just Animals - Just Bears
programme.desc: Venture into the wild to meet the amazing Bear family, some of the largest, strongest mammals roaming the planet. JUST BEARS explores their world, getting up close and personal with the eight fascinating species that make up this group.

programme.title: Nigel Marven’s Wild Philippines - The Volcanic North
programme.desc: The world's 15th Biggest island but the largest in the Philippines. A land of contrasts from the urban sprawl of the capital Manila to huge hidden forests, the world's most species-rich reefs and a dozen active volcanoes that dominate the skylines. Nigel meets the extraordinary creatures that live in these landscapes.

programme.title: Kids' Guide To The Kalahari - Episode 3
programme.desc: The Kids Guide to the Kalahari is a fun, irreverent, yet educational series of 5 minute programmes that bring to life the magic of the Kalahari desert. Narrated by the central character Kusi, the wise old camel thorn tree, each episode looks at a different aspect of Kalahari life and introduces the animal characters. From the cute little ground squirrels to the dignified leopard, Kusi's companions are brought to life by fun, quirky animations that add pace and interest to the stories. A must see for children of reading age and above.

programme.title: Kids' Guide To The Kalahari - Episode 7
programme.desc: The Kids Guide to the Kalahari is a fun, irreverent, yet educational series of 5 minute programmes that bring to life the magic of the Kalahari desert. Narrated by the central character Kusi, the wise old camel thorn tree, each episode looks at a different aspect of Kalahari life and introduces the animal characters. From the cute little ground squirrels to the dignified leopard, Kusi's companions are brought to life by fun, quirky animations that add pace and interest to the stories. A must see for children of reading age and above.

programme.title: Keepers Of The Cape - Rhino Relocation
programme.desc: Keepers of the Cape explores conservation projects in the Western Cape and is presented by Zoologist, Tali Hoffman. Viewers are taken on a journey around the Western Cape exploring the environmental problems and solutions of this inimitable province.

programme.title: Last Devils
programme.desc: Tasmanian Devils are the world's largest carnivorous marsupial and are only found in Tasmania. Each has a different character, sometimes timid, sometimes bold, aggressive or comical... always entertaining. For the first time, we go behind closed doors to see what makes these notorious, yet illusive creatures tick. We are given a unique and revealing 'devil's eye' view of their world through research cameras attached to collars.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places - The Rainforest
programme.desc: Daintree National Park is a magical meeting of rainforest and reef, lying at the heart of the world heritage listed wet tropics of Queensland. The area is a living link to our planet's distant past, to a primeval world from more than 50 million years ago. Biologist Peter Byrne and his research team ride a giant crane to gain a unique view of what many consider to be the last biological frontier.

programme.title: The Last Great Tuskers - Episode 3
programme.desc: In Southern Africa, Zimbabwe is home to some of the world’s most magnificent elephants. These are the Great Tuskers. But this unique tusker gene pool is diminishing each year…dwindling forever to poaching and unethical trophy hunting. Now, for the first time ever, in an attempt to hold on to these great animals, The Zimbabwe National Parks Authority is allowing a dedicated team to attempt to collar and monitor three great tuskers, from three different Zimbabwean national parks. (S1, Ep3)

programme.title: Just Animals - Just Bears
programme.desc: Venture into the wild to meet the amazing Bear family, some of the largest, strongest mammals roaming the planet. JUST BEARS explores their world, getting up close and personal with the eight fascinating species that make up this group.

programme.title: Nigel Marven’s Wild Philippines - The Volcanic North
programme.desc: The world's 15th Biggest island but the largest in the Philippines. A land of contrasts from the urban sprawl of the capital Manila to huge hidden forests, the world's most species-rich reefs and a dozen active volcanoes that dominate the skylines. Nigel meets the extraordinary creatures that live in these landscapes.

programme.title: Vevo UK '90s & '00s
programme.desc: Bringing the best in pop music videos of the 90s and 00s.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: Teenager Megan Walsh (Hailee Steinfeld, Enders Game) is a special ops agent who yearns for a normal adolescence. After faking her own death she assumes the role of an exchange student at a typical American high school, only to find that surviving here is harder than international espionage! Jam-packed with hilarious performances from Samuel L. Jackson, Jessica Alba and Sophie Turner.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: The Exception
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed, allegiances are tested, and love is defined. Set in WWII - when German soldier Stefan (Jai Courtney: Suicide Squad) goes on a mission to investigate exiled German Monarch Kaiser Wilhelm II (Christopher Plummer: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo), he ends up falling dangerously in love with Mieke (Lily James: Cinderella) one of the housemaids. All is fair in love and war.

programme.title: Rise of the Krays
programme.desc: The early years of the two of the most notorious British criminals are portrayed in visceral brutality. London, 1961: Ronnie and Reggie Kray begin a reign of terror that would define London's East End for years to come. From protection rackets to members' clubs, street brawls to arson via blackmail extending all the way up to the Cabinet Office, the Krays rained red on anyone who crossed them.

programme.title: Assassin
programme.desc: Danny Dyer (Eastenders) is back on top form in Assassin, a brutal, hard-hitting story of Jamie, a former hitman out for revenge. Starring Martin Kemp (The Krays), Gary Kemp (The World's End), and from the producers of Rise of the Footsoldier and Goodfellas, Assassin is the story of the most corrupt crime bosses in the London underworld, and one man's crusade to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers
programme.desc: From the mind of Bret Easton Ellis (American Psycho) comes an all-new terrifying killer tale. When a murderous cult arrives on campus, Jake (Ronan Rubenstein, Orange is the New Black) finds himself plagued with mysterious messages that lead him and his friends down the rabbit hole towards murder and mayhem. Jake must decide if the cryptic messages are a prank or if his life is truly at risk.

programme.title: The Exes: An Inconvenient Truth
programme.desc: Stuart's work life is turned upside down when Phil sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly lends Eden some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes: My Dinner With Phil
programme.desc: When Stuart's favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil's ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.title: The Exes: Working Girl
programme.desc: Holly determined to find Stuart a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: Happily Divorced: Pilot
programme.desc: Fran's pushed back into the dating pool after her husband of 18 years drops a bomb by coming out of the closet. Neither can afford to move out of the house so they're stuck living together making it difficult for Fran to be with her new man, Elliott.

programme.title: Happily Divorced: Pillow Talk
programme.desc: After Elliott tells Fran that she's too involved in Peter's life, she fears that their new relationship is in jeopardy. When Fran tries to plan a special evening with Elliott, Peter's drunken night leads to an embarrassing morning for the trio.

programme.title: Hot In Cleveland
programme.desc: Joy accepts her dying boyfriend's marriage proposal but has reservations.

programme.title: Hot In Cleveland
programme.desc: The girls have to get their L.A. friend, Courtney back together with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Hot In Cleveland
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of "Hot in Cleveland" to discover never-before-seen footage of the cast and crew.

programme.title: Hot In Cleveland
programme.desc: The ladies bid on an abandoned storage unit and unearth an item of potentially historical proportions.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The Case of the Curious Hottie
programme.desc: Charlie becomes paranoid after discovering he's dating a private investigator.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Pledges a Sorority Sister
programme.desc: Charlie falls into Jordan's trap when she sets him up with a heartbreaker.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Plays Hide & Go Cheat
programme.desc: Charlie finds himself in a contest with a female private investigator to prove that he could cheat on her without getting caught.

programme.title: Baroness Von Sketch Show: Sex And Things And Whispers
programme.desc: Selfies with celebs a prophetic bedtime story the magical powers of a vision board

programme.title: Baroness Von Sketch Show: It's Because I Care
programme.desc: A little gossip between caring friends a bit of sexual housekeeping making the perfect campfire

programme.title: City Island
programme.desc: Meet the Rizzos, a family that might get along a lot better if only they could tell each other the truth. Dad Vince (Andy Garcia of OCEAN'S Franchise) is the worst offender. But since the prison guard won't even admit that "poker night" is in fact acting class, how's he ever going to explain his illegitimate son? His daughter works as a stripper when she's supposed to be in college, while young Vinnie Jr. (Ezra Miller of TV's CALIFORNICATION) has a secret sexual fetish that involves a 24-hour webcam and the family's 300-pound neighbor. Vince's wife Joyce (Julianna Margulies of TV's THE GOOD WIFE) is the family's rock, but it's been a year since she enjoyed intimacy with her husband, and it's no surprise she thinks "poker night" spells A-F-F-A-I-R. When former prisoner Tony (Steven Strait of STOP-LOSS) enters the Rizzos' lives, Joyce begins to suspect that the handsome young Tony isn't who Vince says he is. A perfect storm of deception, half truths, and confusion makes the family members realize that the truth may not set them free, but it is easier to keep track of than all their well-intentioned white lies.

programme.title: Citizen Duane
programme.desc: CITIZEN DUANE is a comedy/drama about Duane Balfour a teen-aged Don Quixote born into a family of spectacular failure. What starts as a simple schoolyard rivalry snowballs out of control when Duane decides to run for mayor of the tiny town of Ridgeway. If Duane is to succeed, he must not only overcome the powerful incumbents, but also his own inadequacies, public perception, and history itself.

programme.title: Guardian of the Highlands
programme.desc: Sean Connery brings to life Sir Billi, a skateboarding veterinarian and number one grandpa. He channels the spirit of 007 James Bond to go above and beyond the call of duty and rescue a goat who thinks he's a dog, an admiral who's afraid of the water, and a beaver who was raised by rabbits. This heart-warming story is packed with enough stunts, skydiving, and car chases to keep the whole family on the edge of their seats.

programme.title: The Royal Bodyguard: The Limping Assassin S01 E01
programme.desc: Featuring David Jason: It’s the Commonwealth Conference in Scotland, but there’s intelligence that suggests a planned assassination attempt on The Queen. Taking his new role very seriously, Hubble soon manages to upset foreign ambassadors, colleagues, hotel guests and even the restaurant pianist as he haphazardly carries out his security checks. An attractive woman spells trouble as he gives away vital security information – and soon has to go all out to save her Majesty

programme.title: The Royal Bodyguard: Bullets Over Broad Street S01 E02
programme.desc: Featuring David Jason: Hubble enlists the help of his aspirant sniffer dog Winston as he continues in his new role of Royal Bodyguard. It’s the Queen’s birthday, but Hubble soon stumbles into calamity and is forced to take a few days break at a health spa – where he comes across a familiar face and his planned relaxation is suddenly shelved. Hubble returns to duty in time to oversee Her Majesty’s visit to an Oxford Museum, which is far from straightforward.

programme.title: The Royal Bodyguard: The Siege of Blenheim Square S01 E03
programme.desc: Featuring David Jason: A routine shopping trip for a Prince turns into a potentially dangerous siege after a misunderstanding between Hubble and a member of the Prince’s protection team. As negotiations get underway Hubble only seems to be able to worsen the situation. Despite this, he plans his own personal rescue mission.

programme.title: Flirting With Flamenco
programme.desc: When Sylvia's well-meaning dad (Watt) surprises her with a devastating revelation, Sylvia's world is turned upside down. But will she crumble or prove herself at the local flamenco contest? An uplifting feel-good Brit comedy drama, Flirting with Flamenco will have you laughing, crying and feeling empowered to turn your life around.

programme.title: Soundtrack to Sixteen
programme.desc: Soundtrack to Sixteen is a coming-of-age film about two anxious teens growing up in London in the 2000s. Maisy is self-conscious and constantly overanalysing. She is obsessed with having her first kiss this year, before she turns seventeen, but stalking the boy next door doesn't seem to be working. Meanwhile Ben, a boy from a nearby school, is happy being a nerd and thinking he's better than everyone else until his grades start plummeting. For the first time he must come face to face with the idea that he might, in fact, be average. When the two meet each other on the night bus things get even more confusing for them as they attempt to navigate their first potential romance under the stress of exams that will define their future.

programme.title: Alien Trespass

programme.title: Fool For Love
programme.desc: Stevie's ex-husband arrives at Drovers Run with some surprising news: their divorce never went through and he's here to win her back. Meanwhile, Jodi's fundraising for the CFS gets a boost when she meets new recruit Dylan, and Dave and Nick continue to butt heads over Tess.

programme.title: Make or Break
programme.desc: When Tess's truck breaks down on the way to the sale, a stranger named Bree offers to help. Tess sends Jodi and Bree on to the sale with her cattle, but they end up being kidnapped and Tess must enlist the aid of Nick, Stevie, and Alex on her search.

programme.title: Second Chance
programme.desc: Meg's glamorous sister, Celia Rivers, arrives at Drovers Run. They have a falling out over their disparate lives and Celia heads into the bush in a huff and gets lost. The Drovers women, with Nick and Alex, set out in search of her.

programme.title: Call Me Kate
programme.desc: Jodi battles with what seems like the biggest decision of her life after her old friend Kate Manfredi arrives at the ranch. Tess hires Kate on a three-month probation period because they need all the help they can get at Drovers Run.

programme.title: Three Sisters
programme.desc: Jaz returns to Drovers Run and clashes with Grace, leaving Regan stuck playing the role of peacemaker. Stevie, however, is glad to see Jaz and feels their old tensions are behind them. Jaz volunteers to help out around the farm but discovers she's picked up the wrong bag at the bus stop.

programme.title: Dammed
programme.desc: The girls of Drovers Run band together with the local community to stop a massive dam being built upstream. When Olympic-hopeful Jaz is made the face of the campaign, she finds herself blackmailed by pro-dam farmer Terri Barker, who threatens to reveal an explosive secret from her past.

programme.title: Mother Love
programme.desc: Tayler and Patrick's happy domesticity is disrupted when Tayler's mother, Jane, returns. Jane wants to set the record straight with her daughter about why she left, but Tayler is wary. Meanwhile, baby Xander has not smiled yet, and it's worrying Stevie immensely.

programme.title: Bright Lights, Big Trouble
programme.desc: Grace, Jaz, Marcus, and Frank head off to the city to confront the Minister responsible for a dam proposal that will take away their water. Meanwhile, Phil gives Moira a personal and surprising gift.

programme.title: Love and Let Die
programme.desc: Jaz is taken aback when Lily reveals her dad, Frank, is talking about proposing to her. Jaz needs to decide how to deal with the situation. Frank's hopes for a stable family life take a pounding when he learns that his ex-wife has a new job in Queensland and intends to take Lily with her.

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: Marcus has been looking for a new overseer for weeks, but given his constant clashing with Ben, neither of them can accept that Ben is right for the job. The district Yard Dog trials are fast approaching when Ben is befriended by a border collie.

programme.title: My Prince Will Come
programme.desc: After finding her horse from Europe grazing in the paddock, Jaz is surprised to discover she has been personally delivered by Mischa. The others are stunned to discover Mischa is a wealthy prince and Jaz's ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: DUST Collection
programme.desc: A compilation of films created by humans from the planet Earth.

programme.title: DUST Collection
programme.desc: The future looks bright. Stories that leave you feeling better than before.

programme.title: DUST Collection
programme.desc: A combination of a noir and science fiction, these films highlight technology as a destructive force.

programme.title: ALTER Collection
programme.desc: They say the scariest monsters are the ones in our minds. But what about the ones inside our bellies?

programme.title: DUST Collection
programme.desc: Experience the different worlds and creatures that make up the multiverse we all call home.

programme.title: DUST Collection
programme.desc: When Mother Earth joins forces with the extraterrestrial, a new type of evolution emerges.

programme.title: DUST Collection
programme.desc: Despite all your best intentions, sometimes the only person standing in your way is “you.”

programme.title: ALTER Collection
programme.desc: Being a teenager is difficult, and that's before you add in hand monsters, alternate realities and demons.

programme.title: DUST Collection
programme.desc: There’s a soul in the heart of every machine—for better or for worse.

programme.desc: Documentary series profiling the work of high-speed police units across Britain.

programme.title: Traffic Cops: Episode 14
programme.desc: On the road with the front-line, fighting crime and disorder on Britain’s streets.

programme.title: Traffic Cops: Episode 15
programme.desc: On the road with the front-line, fighting crime and disorder on Britain’s streets.

programme.title: Traffic Cops: Episode 16
programme.desc: On the road with the front-line, fighting crime and disorder on Britain’s streets.

programme.title: SEVE - Artist, Fighter, Legend
programme.desc: Seve Ballesteros was an artist, a golfing Picasso. He was a fighter against back injury, rivals on the golf course, a disintegrating swing, and finally cancer. He remains a legend, a multi-major champion and the man who made the modern Ryder Cup. This is his story, from members of his inner circle, other sporting greats and from himself via newly unearthed material.

programme.title: Champions: Germany
programme.desc: Bundesliga winner and AC Milan player Julia Simic travels from Nuremberg to pick up Dafina Redzepi (TSG Hoffenheim) and visit Bärbel Wohlleben, who has the honour of being the first woman to have scored an ARD Sportschau Goal of the Month. Julia shows us the football camp she has set up to train in a new generation of young women, while Bärbel recalls her childhood years and how the German football federation (DFB) banned women from playing professional football. The three play on the banks of the Rhine talking about their shared passion for the sport.

programme.title: Made in Senegal
programme.desc: Made in Senegal is a story about will, dreams, determination, faith, rebellion, courage and love. The film invites us on a journey through Sadio´s different and highly diverse worlds - from the rural life in a small village in the far south of Senegal to the spotlight of world football by playing for Liverpool FC, even winning the Champions Leagues as number 10 with the world watching… The interaction of animations, documentary scenes, a diverse set of in-depth interviews and archive footage brings Sadio´s past to life and creates an exciting and emotional plot.

programme.title: Ona Carbonell: Starting Over
programme.desc: In August 2020, Olympic artistic swimmer Ona Carbonell became a first time mother, an experience that reshaped her life overnight. At the same time, Ona embarked on an ambitious plan to compete at the Tokyo Olympics. The documentary follows Ona during these intense 11 months, where she must push the limits to extraordinary degrees both physically and emotionally. Up close to Ona, we share her everyday routines and challenges, from breastfeeding and playing with baby Kai to the intense training sessions with the National Spanish Team.

programme.title: Champions: England
programme.desc: The Flores family eats breakfast, lunch and dinner with football at the table. The young sisters Tatiana and Silvana train with their father, a former player in Mexico, readily receiving his guidance to form their own blossoming careers. Kelly Smith, a true football legend, leading scorer in the history of the England women's team, waits for them at home. Before the meeting with the Flores sisters, she shares the hardest moments of her career with the camera. Meanwhile, Lucy Bronze (Manchester City FC), FIFA Best Women's Player of the Year 2020, looks back on her career, making some surprising statements.

programme.title: Barcelona: Surf Destination
programme.desc: In "Barcelona: Surf Destination", Ítalo Ferreira, the first Olympic surf champion, travels to Barcelona at the invitation of his friend Alex Vilalta to explore the waves of the Catalan coastline and meet the community of surfers that keep the spirit of the sport alive in this Mediterranean hub. In this sun-soaked adventure documentary, we are invited to join a holiday with friends, who reunite to shoot the breeze and to do what they love the most: surf.

programme.title: The Giants
programme.desc: The Giants (3 episodes): We follow the epic lives of sumo legends who made it from humble beginnings in Hawaii, to becoming the first foreigners to rise to the highest ranks in sumo.

programme.title: Mythbusters S05 - Ep 14
programme.desc: On this high-velocity episode of Mythbusters, we test two highly contentious legends that span 500 years of locomotion- from the reliable horse to the sometimes-unreliable motorcar.

programme.title: Mythbusters S05 - Ep 15
programme.desc: In this episode of Mythbusters, it's double the trouble as Adam and Jamie take on not one but two classic comedy myths. Meanwhile Kari Grant and Tory cook up some fun, and the largest bang in Mythbusters history, testing if you can make homemade diamonds.

programme.title: Mythbusters S05 - Ep 16
programme.desc: On this extra-sticky episode of Mythbusters, we put a classic physics 'thought-problem' to the test, and then take on two 'magic bullet' myths- one from television, and the other from an American frontier legend.

programme.title: Mythbusters S05 - Ep 17
programme.desc: On this all-viral episode of Mythbusters, the team puts the most requested YouTube myths and requests to the test. They size up a smash web-hit about a giant ball of Lego and discover the explosive power of match heads. Then answer their fans in a smoking car test to seeing if a spinning car tire can go up in fire.

programme.title: Mythbusters S05 - Ep 18
programme.desc: It's an episode of real genius, explosive action and dangerous driving. So business as usual then!

programme.title: Mythbusters S05 - Ep 19
programme.desc: On this high-flying episode of Mythbusters, the whole team tackles one massive and improbable myth from the fan site: could a skydiver whose parachute failed to open hit a playground see-saw and send a small girl flying seven stories high? And would she survive the ordeal?

programme.title: Mythbusters S08 - Ep 01
programme.desc: In Trench Torpedo, Adam and Jamie tackle a blast from the past - can a trench's corner construction really shelter a shockwave? Meanwhile, Kari, Tory and Grant are clowning around with car crashes as they find out if party balloons can ever act as an airbag.

programme.title: Mythbusters S08 - Ep 02
programme.desc: Adam and Jamie, joined by James Cameron, tackle the most requested myth in MythBuster history and Kari, Grant and Tory ride a rocket-powered surfboard.

programme.title: Mythbusters S05 - Ep 06
programme.desc: On this infectious episode of Mythbusters, we give internet 'viral videos' a timely check-up. They're exciting, funny, and sometimes barely credible. We can't wait to pass them on to our ten best friends, but can we truly believe everything we see?

programme.title: Mythbusters S05 - Ep 07
programme.desc: On this episode of Mythbusters Adam and Jamie take a fan mail film and use it to dial in on a phone book fable. And then Kari, Grant and Tory test a fishy tale of Hollywood pyrotechnics with their own big bang theories.

programme.title: How environmentally friendly are electric vehicles?
programme.desc: Electric cars are supposed to be more environment friendly than vehicles with combustion engines. But how ecological is it to produce batteries, and are they used efficiently? We take a look at technical developments and ask how we can produce more environment-friendly batteries and make the energy management of electric cars more efficient.

programme.title: Traceable
programme.desc: In a world filled with throw-away fashion, emerging designer Laura Siegel’s dream is to shift the perspectives of consumers and connect them to the hands that craft her garments. Follow this idealistic designer as she travels across India to produce her collection. But will positioning her collection in the sustainable domain enable her to survive in the highly competitive fashion industry?

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: In this programme we tell the Story of the Scots Pine how it died out in this country and plans made to reintroduce it to Ireland from Caledonian Forests in Scotland. Even though it is called the Scots Pine it is native to Ireland and is commonly seen in County Donegal and County Wicklow. Manchán Magan talks to Donal Magnier the author of 'Stopping by Woods' to learn more.

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: This programme is about our native Tree the Birch and Manchán Magan is in GlenVeagh county Donegal aptly named after the Birch in Gaelic , ‘Gleann Bheithe’ . Whilst there he also discovers some elm trees and that the elm is disease free in this part of Ireland. It is also said that years and years ago when Ireland was coming out of an ice age the birch was the first tree to colonise the country and is often the first tree to bud in Spring .Manchán talks to Dónal Ó Cnáimhse to learn more .

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: On the shores of the lakes in Killarney are some of the most beautiful trees amongst them our Native Irish Oak and a native Irish Oak forest called 'Ullans' unlikely to have changed in thousands of years. Killarney is home to a very unusual and rare native Irish Tree called 'The strawberry Tree" a tree native to Ireland only but not to the UK which tells an interesting story about our ancient history. Also featuring in this episode is a native Yew Forest one of three surviving in Europe today.

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: In this programme Manchán Magan goes in search of the story of the yew which is often associated with eternity , the other world and often found in graveyards around the country .He visits Reenadinna a native yew wood in Killarney and a very interesting story about the Yew found in County Fermannagh .

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: Manchán looks at the Pedunculate oak in this country probably our most noble of trees. We see this type of Oak on the lowlands more commonly , often as a standalone beautiful sight . We learn about the importance of the oak in the making of Ink long ago , and we see the lurgan canoo which is 15 metres long, proof of how tall this oak grew long ago and we visit Charleville to see the King Oak .

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: In this programme Manchán Magan looks at two of our native trees that bear fruit, the crab apple and the hazel and some of the traditions associated with the Autumn , mainly Haloween . He also looks at a practice which is very old and making a come back called coppicing and looks at ways that hazel was used long ago for housing and more.

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: In this episode Manchán Magan looks at two of our native trees commonly found in our Hedgerows, the Ash, and the hawthorn. Many of them that were planted in the eighteenth century when a lot of commonage was turned into private land. We meet up with Eddi Lunishan who talks about the hawthorn and the faries and others who discuss the goodness in leavesthe hawthorn leaves and flowers . A visit to Teagasc sheds light on the ash dieback disease and looks to some hope for the future.

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: Manchán Magan looks at the history of our forests from prehistorical times to modern day commercial forests. He looks at the types of axes used and other means to fell forests for farming land in prehsitoric times. The programme looks at how we only had 1% forest cover at the beginning of the 1900 hundreds and how the State intervened and set up the Avondale project importing trees from abroad that might suit Ireland’s climate. The sitka spruce being a great example.

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: Manchán Magan takes a look at our naturalised trees which came here with the movemnet of people into our country and are not native as such to Ireland, trees like the Horse Chestnut, the sycamore,

programme.title: The Secret World Of Trees
programme.desc: In this programme Manchán Magan visits Powerscourt, Co Wicklow which is a home to some of the most exotic trees in the world amongst them the Tallest Tree in Ireland 62 meteres tall the Douglas Fir.

programme.title: Search for the Mystery Bomber
programme.desc: Ben Cropp returns to a mystery bomber found in 2005 and identifies it as a B17 Flying Fortress that carried an American general who was lost in the crash.

programme.title: Boatmen
programme.desc: Settled down for over 100 years in the Isla Maciel, the boatmen that cross back and forward the Riachuelo,provide a service to the people on both sides of the most polluted watercourse in Argentina. But the re-building of a bridge between the island and the Federal Capital will check the job they inherited from their grandfathers and great grandfathers, a "collateral damage" that comes from the hand of progress.

programme.title: The Zone - Post atomic journey
programme.desc: The movie directors, Alessandro Tesei and Pierpaolo Mittica , joined a group of young Ukrainians stalkers and penetrate in Chernobyl exclusion zone, filming one of the most incredible and adventurous trip ever made.

programme.title: Adopted by Dolphins - Flipper's Family Secrets
programme.desc: Adopted by Dolphins' follows a group of researchers who are accepted as companions by bottlenose dolphins in the Red Sea. A group of divers and marine biologists accompany up to 100 wild dolphins for days and for the very first time watch their behaviour from a dolphin’s perspective. Willingly, the animals expose their social behaviour and games, their exciting love life and even the use of medical substances provided by corals. This is a capturing story of love, war and drama.

programme.title: Ancient Grains - Amaranth
programme.desc: When you open your pantry, do images of the rugged mountains of South America, the colorful tablelands of Africa and the fertile river valleys of the Middle East dance before your eyes? If not, you have yet to discover amaranth, quinoa, spelt, kamut and teff, the quintet of nutritional powerhouses known as the ancient grains. The legends behind their origins many millennia past, their loss over time and their ultimate modern revival - literally tell the story of civilization.

programme.title: Ancient Grains - Quinoa
programme.desc: When you open your pantry, do images of the rugged mountains of South America, the colorful tablelands of Africa and the fertile river valleys of the Middle East dance before your eyes? If not, you have yet to discover amaranth, quinoa, spelt, kamut and teff, the quintet of nutritional powerhouses known as the ancient grains. The legends behind their origins many millennia past, their loss over time and their ultimate modern revival - literally tell the story of civilization.

programme.title: The CRISPR Revolution - Genome Editing
programme.desc: Is it the latest gene scandal or a blessing for medicine and agriculture? CRISPR allows scientists to change the genetic material of all living organisms. Researchers are developing therapies for incurable diseases plants with new characteristics are being created. But the designer baby is also within reach. How far should medicine or agriculture be allowed to go? Researchers, ethicists and critics do agree: society urgently needs to debate the chances and boundaries of genetic engineering.

programme.title: The Revolutionary Cure
programme.desc: The revolutionary cure. In Cuba, they have more than 15 years researching a treatment based on a type of indigenous Scorpion venom, which is a great palliative for some types of cancer patients since the venom attacks the cancer cells. We will visit the facilities of the pharmaceutical company (Labiofam) that makes it, we'll go hunting the Scorpion with Cuban biologists, we sure the director of Labiofam, as well as doctors and Cuban patients and foreigners who had come from all over the world.

programme.title: Killer in the Caves
programme.desc: About 6.5 million bats have died in the last six years in North America. A disease is driving the Little Brown Bats to extinction and causes mass mortalities among other bat species. The epidemic is still a riddle, but bat-experts piece together information like criminal investigators. The ingenuity of the scientists is captured through astonishing experiments and groundbreaking technology in an effort to understand this mysterious disease and learn more about this common yet unknown animal.

programme.title: Data Mining The Deceased
programme.desc: More than half of North Americans are fascinated by genealogy. Some gain a sense of identity by uncovering their ancestors, their culture, and their country of origin. Others find it disorienting when they discover that their history differs from what they have always believed. But there is another side to the rise in genealogy that goes beyond human interest. It is arguably the largest historical enterprise in the world, driven by big religion, big business and big technology.

programme.title: So Long
programme.desc: So Long’ follows two women post breakup as they regain independence.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: We take an honest and often entertaining look at what goes on in the consultation room.

programme.title: Dicing with Death: Pakistan: In the Valley of the Immortals
programme.desc: During the winter, the villages above 3500 metres in altitude, are cut off from the rest of the world. Only a few precipitous tracks cut through the schist of the mountain. These tracks are the only food supply routes for the villages of Shimshal or Chipoorson.

programme.title: Dicing with Death: Mexico
programme.desc: Millions of people from central America travel thousands of miles attempting to reach the promised land: the US. It’s a journey fraught with danger. Jumping onto moving trains, they run the risk of being killed or severely mutilated should they fall.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Bogota, Colombia Part 2
programme.desc: The Carcel Distrital is located in one of the most dangerous quarters of Bogotá. Nearly 950 men and 50 women are imprisoned here. Most are still awaiting their final judgment.

programme.title: Meet the Mennonites: Inside the Ultra-Conservative Community
programme.desc: The ultra-conservative Christian community of the Mennonites rejects modern society and lives a life frozen in the 19th century. They live in self-sufficient, isolated colonies, which helps protect them from the temptations of the modern world.

programme.title: Risk Takers: United States Coast Guard
programme.desc: Cruising their cutters through the open ocean and flying their jets and choppers overhead, the United States Coast Guard is always ready to serve and protect America’s waterways.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Bogota, Colombia Part 1
programme.desc: It's just a small prison, but a hard one. The Carcel Distrital in Bogotá, Colombia. Every day, the prison staff of 170 ensures stern discipline and order within the red brick walls.

programme.title: The Most Dangerous Ways to School: Ethiopia
programme.desc: When the schoolchildren wake up to the first rays of sunshine, the temperature is already over 30 degrees Celsius. They live in the Danakil desert in northeast Ethiopia, near an active volcano, in a region that is the world’s hottest on average.

programme.title: Dicing with Death: Congo Kivu
programme.desc: When the Congo gained it’s independence it had the best road network in central Africa, but the situation has deteriorated and today only 2% of roads are paved during the rainy season many parts of the country turn into a muddy bog.

programme.title: Dicing with Death: Bhutan: Happiness at All Costs
programme.desc: Nestling in the foot of the Himalayas, Bhutan is mostly criss-crossed by tracks clinging onto the peaks of dizzying mountains. During the monsoon period, travelers juggle with mud and landslides, traffic is often jammed for several days on end.

programme.title: Mountain Rescue

programme.title: Mountain Rescue

programme.title: A Prison on Earth
programme.desc: In the shadows of other dimensions, there lies a nefarious force waging war upon humans for millennia from the space between spaces - a dark force that governs not just our thoughts and actions but our very souls.

programme.title: The Shark Con
programme.desc: A rollercoaster ride into the big business of shark fishing, revealing the controversial truth about the industry and answering the question: Are sharks overfished or is this just an elaborate con?

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, NASA successfully sent 24 men where no human beings had been before or since. The final mission, Apollo 17, flew in December 1972 and closed the final chapter in NASA's triumphant Apollo Program. Using spectacular NASA high-definition archive footage, mission audio and rare astronaut interviews, this is a unique documentary film that comprehensively chronicles one of the greatest moments in mankind's history.

programme.title: Aliens: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: Does alien life exist out there in the Universe? Scientists are now getting closer than ever to answering that question thanks to the Kepler Space Telescope. This revolutionary spacecraft is on a mission to find habitable alien planets. Thanks to Kepler, we now know of thousands of possible planets and we’re getting closer than ever to finding the holy grail: a twin of our Earth. We use CGI to bring these alien worlds to life, and with the help of scientists, we speculate on what extra-terrestrial life might be like.

programme.title: Eastwood
programme.desc: On May 31st, legendary actor, director, and producer Clint Eastwood turns 91 years old. Eastwood is Hollywood royalty with a career spaning more than 70 years. From Rawhide to Dirty Harry to Gran Torino Clint participated in productions on 4 continents, in 3 languages, of 5 different genres and eventually garnering 4 Academy Awards. Sabbatical Entertainment proudly presents our newest documentary reliving and recounting the life of one of the greatest artist in the history of entertainment.

programme.title: True Story of Angelina Jolie
programme.desc: This documentary tells the story of, Angelina Jolie. Follow step by step every moment of her life and career from her childhood till today. With the help of experts and people that knew her personally, this program will enlighten us about this amazing personality, the ups and downs and how she came to be one of the most acclaimed and renowned actresses of our times.

programme.title: JFK Junior: Final 24
programme.desc: He was American royalty and a cultural icon. JFK Jr.'s promise of living out his political legacy bequeathed to him on the day of his father's assassination was cut short over the Atlantic Ocean one hot July night. Kennedy's death and that of his wife and sister-in-law, were the result of a series of bad decisions Kennedy had made during his last day.

programme.title: Marvin Gaye: Final 24
programme.desc: On his last day alive soul superstar Marvin Gaye is depressed and paranoid. We delve into the Prince of Motown's violent childhood to uncover the root of Marvin's strained relationship with his strict father and to understand his struggle with drugs.

programme.title: Australian Drug Lords
programme.desc: Police get a tip-off that Olympic kayaking hero Nathan Baggaley and his brother Dru Baggaley are running a multi-million dollar ecstasy empire along the east coast of Australia.

programme.title: Australian Drug Lords
programme.desc: Police put two security guards under surveillance and discover the duo is responsible for a series of armed-robberies, kidnapping and ram-raids. And that's just the tip of the iceberg.

programme.title: Dark Secret
programme.desc: The hidden story of one of the worst criminal cover-ups in America's history: The victims - hundreds of children whose lives were destroyed. The perpetrators - Catholic clergy protected by their church. The inside story of what happened when Philadelphia's District Attorney heard that there was a list of 35 priests guilty of child sexual abuse and asked why they weren't brought to justice.

programme.title: Rainforest Home

programme.title: Fly over nature: Iceland

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys, our distant cousins have much in common with us. They’re intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships.

programme.title: Fly over nature: Australia
programme.desc: Impressive aerial photographs of the Australian continent were taken during the filming of a series. Australia has never been seen so wild.

programme.title: Desert & Life
programme.desc: Vast swathes of Australia hold sandy deserts, where aboriginal people have found ways to survive.

programme.title: Desert & Life

programme.title: Baby Animals in Our World

programme.title: Baby Animals in Our World

programme.title: Baby Animals in Our World
programme.desc: We are here to visit the farm to catch the antics of the babies in the country.

programme.title: Austin Stevens
programme.desc: Austin heads to the barren landscape of northern Australia, searching for some of the world's most dangerous reptiles. He battles harsh terrain, high temperatures and monsoons in a bid to photograph the indigenous snakes and lizards.

programme.title: Austin Stevens
programme.desc: Austin Stevens travels to Swaziland in search of the rare black rhino. After a number of close and dangerous encounters, Austin finally finds what he is looking for.

programme.title: Austin Stevens
programme.desc: Austin travels South Africa in search of one of the most swift killers on the continent. After much tracking, he finally lucks out and comes upon a fresh kill. Now all he has to do is wait.

programme.title: Austin Stevens
programme.desc: Austin heads to Sri Lanka to photograph the rare tusked Asian Elephant. These creatures are primarily docile, but when Austin encroaches on their turf, he gets a truck-sized run for his money.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East

programme.title: Eagles - Kings of the Skies

programme.title: Lobsters - The armoured knights of the oceans

programme.desc: With more Caribou in Alaska than people, they’re the lifeblood of many remote communities. But human expansion, and wild predators, have led to their rapid decline.

programme.title: Billion Dollar Fish
programme.desc: Deep in the waters of the Danube lives a prehistoric giant. They survived when the dinosaurs became extinct and are with us still, but now time is running out. This ancient giant is the Beluga Sturgeon.

programme.title: Rock of Ages

programme.title: Aurora: Fire In The Sky

programme.title: Wildest India

programme.title: Catching Giants

programme.title: Black Enough? - Season 1
programme.desc: A video explainer series that explores and celebrates black arts, culture and representation

programme.title: Our House
programme.desc: Brian was down on his luck and sleeping rough in Liverpool. Lawrence was a successful hotelier and property developer. David was a self-proclaimed hippy in a dead-end job. Together they formed an unlikely alliance and created a homeless shelter like no other. But can it last?

programme.title: How to fix space's junk problem | Too black for Brazil
programme.desc: No TV, no sat nav, no internet: how to fix space's junk problem | Too black for Brazil

programme.title: The gym fighting gang violence in east London | How the Covid pandemic has led to more Channel crossings
programme.desc: The gym fighting gang violence in east London: 'Death and trauma shouldn't be normality' | How the Covid pandemic has led to more Channel crossings

programme.title: We Walk Together
programme.desc: Thousands of refugees were sleeping rough at Budapest’s Keleti station, waiting for trains to take them to western Europe. Then, they just got up and walked. Guardian journalist and filmmaker John Domokos went with them, every step of the way. This is the story of one Syrian family, and those who came out to help

programme.title: Somalinimo
programme.desc: As students return to universities around the world, four British-Somali students talk about navigating one of Britain’s most elite institutions: Cambridge University. Their identity is rooted in Somalinimo (‘the essence of being Somali’) and in this love letter to Somali culture, blackness and Islam, they reflect on both belonging and marginalisation.

programme.title: Love Jihad: India's lethal religious conspiracy theory
programme.desc: The mutilated body of a 24-year-old Muslim, Arbaaz Aftab Mullah, was discovered on a railway track near his home. His family believe he was murdered because of his interfaith relationship with a Hindu woman and that he is one of the latest victims of the 'love jihad' conspiracy theory, which has swept across groups of Hindu nationalists in India. The theory claims that Muslim men are seducing Hindu women and luring them into marriage in order to convert them to Islam.

programme.title: After Windrush – Paulette Wilson's visit to Jamaica, 50 years on
programme.desc: A letter from the British government classifying Paulette Wilson as an illegal immigrant shook her sense of identity and belonging. ‘Hostile environment’ policies years in the making meant that Wilson and other victims of the Windrush scandal had their right to residency in the UK called into question. She had been detained for a week pending imminent deportation though she had done nothing wrong. It was devastating, but luckily she was released before she was deported.

programme.title: Second innings
programme.desc: From Afghanistan to London, three boys build a new life playing cricket. Tucked away in suburban south London, matches take place every week for young and often traumatised asylum seekers. Many have fled war and have been separated from their families. The Refugee Cricket project, organised by the Refugee Council, provides not only a chance to play and make friends, but also to access advice and support as they navigate the complex asylum system and other challenges in their new home

programme.title: Fish story
programme.desc: Sometime in the 1980s, Caspar Salmon's grandmother was invited to a gathering on the Welsh island of Anglesey, attended exclusively by people with fish surnames. Or so he says. Thirty years later, film-maker Charlie Lyne attempts to sort myth from reality.

programme.title: My life in a hotel room: Ireland’s hidden homeless crisis
programme.desc: Nuala and her teenage daughter, Laura, were suddenly evicted from their Dublin home when their landlord of 10 years was forced to sell by his creditors. They haven’t been able to find a new place to rent. Despite having been on the council house waiting list for more than six years they are still only around 600th in line. Now, like almost 10,000 other people and 1,700 families across Ireland, Nuala and Laura are homeless..

programme.title: Four weddings
programme.desc: Not all weddings are about marrying a prince. This documentary tells the story of four special weddings around the world from the point of view of the bride. Featuring a British woman unsure of the future, a soldier discharged from Iraq, a high society Indian wedding and a rural Romanian celebration, this is what really happens behind the scenes on the wedding day

programme.title: The UK's first professional trans choir: 'It's a joyful act of resistance'
programme.desc: Anil Sebastian and Coda Galabov are the creators of a new choir called Trans Voices, which offers a space for trans and non-binary people who have felt unable to sing with their true voices in traditional choirs. We follow the group as they improvise their first performance at London's Union Chapel, composing what they see as a joyful act of resistance.

programme.title: Guardian Cities: Divided Cities
programme.desc: Divided Cities goes beyond Trump and Brexit to tell the story of five cities that reflect big global divisions in surprising and troubling ways.

programme.title: Shopping lists from Ukraine's frontlines | Inside Ukraine's reserve army preparing to defend Kyiv
programme.desc: Shopping lists from Ukraine's frontlines: Manchester's response to Putin's war | Waiting for the enemy: inside Ukraine's reserve army preparing to defend Kyiv

programme.title: Quipu: Calls for Justice
programme.desc: Esperanza and Teodula are calling for justice in rural Peru, part of 300,000 people sterilised without consent more than 18 years ago. The Quipu Project is their phoneline that allows victims across the country to share their shocking testimonies and ensure those responsible are punished.

programme.title: Little Pyongyang
programme.desc: Joong-wha Choi, a former soldier in North Korea, lives today with his wife and children in New Malden - the south London suburb that is home to Europe's biggest North Korean population. Despite enjoying the new-found comforts of his British life, he would like to return to his homeland. Joong-wha reflects on both why he left North Korea and the state of his day-to-day life over the course of several months, in a portrait of loss, longing, and the complexities of healing from trauma.

programme.title: "I want to bring up a warrior": Ukraine's far-right children's camp
programme.desc: In Ukraine, the far-right Azov militia is fighting on the frontline – and running a summer camp for children. The Guardian visited the camp and followed 16-year-old Anton through his experiences. Is Azov really a modern Hitler Youth organisation, or is it trying to prepare young Ukrainians for the tough reality that awaits them?

programme.title: Teranga: the migrant-run Afrobeat nightclub uniting Naples
programme.desc: Fata and Yankuba are two young Gambians with ambitious dreams, who fled dictatorship and poverty and landed in Naples, only to discover a new kind of violence: a pernicious climate of racism and an unhelpful immigration system. Their only escape from the psychological torture of years spent waiting for documents in squalid camps is a small underground club in the heart of the city. The Teranga nightclub provides a rare safe space for migrants to meet young Italians.

programme.title: Erica: man made
programme.desc: Erica is 23. She has a beautiful, neutral face and speaks with a synthesised voice. She has a degree of autonomy – but can’t move her hands yet. Hiroshi Ishiguro is her ‘father’ and the bad boy of Japanese robotics. Together they will redefine what it means to be human and reveal that the future is closer than we might think.

programme.title: Off The Grid Libreville, Gabon
programme.desc: The capital of Gabon, Libreville offers an off the grid route to the host Emeline. From the scenic trails of Pongara National Park to exciting beach experiences, Libreville comes across as a pleasant surprise. But what’s more exciting is watching a number of sea turtles making their nests and hatching eggs near the beach. Emeline’s quest also leads her to a tête-à-tête with a conservationist where she learns about saving turtles.

programme.title: Sunday Sessions

programme.title: Frankie vs. the Internet
programme.desc: Baking videos send our social media feeds in a frenzy and we can’t seem to get enough. Watch as creators impress the judges with a show stopping focaccia, then pay tribute to the mini pancake cereal trend by concocting their own unique cereal.

programme.title: Frankie vs. the Internet
programme.desc: The internet falls fast for snacks and hacks that look like one thing but taste like another. Creators must make “donuts” with anything but traditional batter, then flip the script on ramen, using it in an unconventional yet recognizable way.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's United Kingdom
programme.desc: Luke meets up with his London-based brother and explores some of the city's fascinating foodie markets. He learns the secrets to baking a traditional Victorian sponge, and later uses traditional ingredients to create an unusual, fresh salad.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's United Kingdom

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's United Kingdom
programme.desc: Luke visits the famous Salisbury Cathedral and learns the secrets behind the city's oldest pub, The Haunch of Venison, and Lacock Abbey. Setting up shop at the Winchester farmers' market, Luke cooks mussels with some surprisingly local ingredients.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's United Kingdom
programme.desc: Venturing out with local Newquay fisherman Phil, Luke helps catch spiny spider crabs and cooks up Asian-inspired crab cakes. Then, Luke meets Cornwall's "best" pasty maker, before discovering what it takes to produce caviar that's fit for the Queen.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's United Kingdom
programme.desc: In Cardiff, Luke meets an artisan bread maker who delivers bread to homes by bicycle. Next, Luke heads to the seaside and stumbles across the Hang Fire Smokehouse pop-up restaurant. Then, he travels to Wentwood Reservoir for a spot of fly fishing.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's United Kingdom

programme.desc: TGE checks out some Audi R8s, from the 2019 performance edition, to the RWD, to an R8 with some crazy modifications.

programme.title: Core: The Essence of Rock Climbing
programme.desc: Nothing is more exciting than exploring a new place. Climbers have figured that out long ago as they would travel extensively to discover new areas to test their abilities on different rocks. Rock climbing rewards those with a creative approach to the challenges presented by nature. This film is about the climbers who accomplish things most people only dream about and their search for new playgrounds. CORE is a breathtaking immersion in the landscapes and lifestyles that define climbing which has become the latest craze in urban culture.

Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: SCL Norway
programme.desc: The spectacular Fefor Arena hosted for the 8th time the Worlds Strongest Viking, part of the SCL World Series. But with the absence of former title holders its anyones game. Again, a very spectacular episode of the Strongman Champions League here in Norway.

programme.title: SCL Finland
programme.desc: In this episode, the Titan, former double World champion from Latvia will compete against his fellow countryman and the current World champion - Aivars Smaukstelis. With 8 events over 2 stages the contestants are pushed to their limits in Finland.

programme.title: SCL Finland 2
programme.desc: Dainis Zageris and Aivars Smaukstelis, both from Latvia have a serious, strong battle in the this second and final episode of the SCL Finland 2020. Watch the unbelievable and brute power of these athletes in the last 4 events to crown the winner.

programme.title: World Record Breakers
programme.desc: The SCL Germany event takes place in an ancient castle called Die Burg in the heart of Germany. Its here where 5 world record attempts take place across 5 different events with 10 athletes. They will go to the max! See this and much more in the SCL Germany 2020.

programme.title: Strongest Viking
programme.desc: SCL Norway is normally all about snow, wind, and cold weather. Our brave athletes are used to compete under conditions few other athletes have competed in, but after COVID delays the competition has been moved from winter to summer bringing in a whole new range of challenges. With an impressive athlete list who will be the winner across 5 cruel events?

programme.title: World Str Team 1
programme.desc: Were in sunny Finland for the next stage of a double-bill of SCL action, but this time its a team event. A truly fantastic event with 6000 spectators. Even during COVID times this was exceptional! 8 Strong Teams where fighting for the title over a crazy 9 events.

programme.title: World Str Team 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland, done over 9 cruel events. In this episode the last and final 5 events take place. 8 Strong Teams are fighting for the title.

programme.title: SCL Portugal
programme.desc: The next set of challenges are set in sunny Esposende in Portugal. With stars such as Travis Ortmayer, Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland, and Ervin Toots from Estonia. While Fabio Silva will defend the honour in his own country.

programme.title: Captain Sabertooth
programme.desc: The orphan boy Pinky follows the Captain on an exciting and dangerous journey across the big oceans to the kingdom of Lama Rama, hunting for a treasure and the answer to who is Pinky's father.

programme.title: Age of the Dragons
programme.desc: Herman Melville's classic novel Moby Dick, is recreated in a world where Captain Ahab and his crew search for a Great White Dragon.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Star of Heaven
programme.desc: Jack Hunter realizes the pharaoh's tomb being empty except for a Roman coin means the treasure was looted to Rome but later probably transferred the the new, Byzantine capital, Constantinople.

programme.title: Extraction
programme.desc: A former CIA operative is kidnapped by a group of terrorists. His son launches own rescue operation.

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: A stroke of good luck turns lethal for Sam Phelan and his wife Leslie when they are faced with a life-changing decision that brings strange and sinister Pyke Kubic to their doorstep.

programme.title: Spooky Stakeout
programme.desc: Prepare to be totally spooked with a one-of-a-kind ghost busting adventure. When four friends are hired as ghost hunters to investigate a peculiar case of a haunted castle, they are in for an unexpected surprise. From their previous work they realise that there is a strange similarity across all three mysteries. Full of age-appropriate scares and fun-filled humour, perfect for a scary night in!

programme.title: Jock of the Bushveld
programme.desc: Short legs, big heart that's Jock who grows up in South Africa with his loyal friend Percy

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: Joshua (Josh Hutcherson) has a talent - he is able to recreate any painting given to him. So when local art forger Everly (Alfred Molina) promises Joshua he can make him millions, he agrees to forge a specific painting which is apparently lost but in doing so gets tangled in a web of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: World Nature Heritage - USA-Yellowstone
programme.desc: A journey to the home of magnificent bison herds and the oldest national park in the world

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: A battle of honour and a fight for justice

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: An aging alcoholic cop (Bruce Willis) is assigned the task of escorting a witness (Mos Def) from police custody to a courthouse 16 blocks away. There are, however, chaotic forces at work that prevent them from making it in one piece.

programme.title: Minute Moments
programme.desc: The Minute Moments show is all about the precious moments that we share together that make us human. We leave a footprint in the lives of everyone we come across!

programme.title: Minute Sports
programme.desc: A celebration of short films based around the topics of Sports, whether that be conventional or unconventional. Competitive or leisurely, all of these films have a subject at the center!

programme.title: First comes Love
programme.desc: All you need is love this Valentine's day, dive into a beautiful sequence of shorts to celebrate the day of love, through the eyes of these beautiful stories, as told through Minute Shorts.

programme.title: Screening for Ukraine
programme.desc: This playlist was born out of fundraiser event in aid of the ongoing war in Ukraine: Screening for Ukraine. All the films featured were selected on the day as well as additional films for your viewing..

programme.title: Black Lens
programme.desc: Following the recent international Black Lives Matter protests across the globe, we're starting to see change happening but it's not enough..

programme.title: FUNKE Stories - Janvier Wete von Minute Shorts übers Filmemachen, Mut und Medien
programme.desc: Ein Gespräch übers Filmemachen, Mut, Medien, Kino und Erfolg mit Janvier Wete, Gründer der Kurzfilm-Plattform Minute Shorts und Sou Boujloud von FredCarpet

programme.title: Travel Bug
programme.desc: Travel bug will give you that yearning to see the world again in all its wonder through this series of short films. Experience different cultures and people now!

programme.title: Saving Westbrook High
programme.desc: Manny Cortez is uprooting his family so that they can go to Westbrook High where his beloved late father was the football coach. Soon after the Cortez family moves into the Westbrook school zone, however, it is announced that the beloved school will close due to budget cuts. Long known for being a wonderful environment with special teachers, the staff, students and parents decide to put aside their personal differences and fight back for the memories - past, present and future - worth saving.

programme.title: Missed Connections
programme.desc: Marc Reid, a romance novelist, is set up on a blind date by his over-excited sister. Marc, a little less than enthusiastic, ends up picking up the wrong girl from the apartment complex.

programme.title: Meerkat Moonship
programme.desc: Timid, wildly imaginative 13-year-old Gideonette de La Rey learns that the name she was given comes with a horrible curse. After her father dies, Gideonette is paralyzed by fear and is sent to live on a farm in the forest with her grandparents where she befriends a young deaf boy who is “training” to become an astronaut and preparing to fly away in a Moonship that Gideonette’s grandfather had built.

programme.title: God Bless The Broken Road
programme.desc: God Bless the Broken Road tells the story of a young mother who loses her husband in Afghanistan and struggles to raise their young daughter in his absence. The film combines elements of faith, country music, and stock car racing while paying tribute to those who serve in the United States Military.

programme.title: Belle and the Beast: A Christian Romance
programme.desc: Eric Landry is a cold-hearted man that people have nicknamed "the Beast." Years of anger and bitterness have consumed him, turning him into a selfish man. But Belle Watson is the exact opposite. When her father accidentally breaks a valuable work of art at the Landry mansion, Belles agrees to work for Eric in an effort to repay him and save her father's job. She discovers there just might be more to Eric. Will she find the man within the Beast?

programme.title: Whales don't swim
programme.desc: Yves finds refuge from school bullies in synchronized swimming, which he practices nightly in secret until someone discovers what he is up to.

programme.title: Comme des Grands
programme.desc: Lukas surprises Marion by proposing to her. They own a brand new house, all the ingredients for adulthood and commitment are there, or so they thought.

programme.title: Golden Voices
programme.desc: A paranormal investigator wants to uncover the source of the Golden Voices appearing on unknown frequencies across Indiana.

programme.title: Have Wine, Will Travel
programme.desc: Betty is fighting a hangover. In between morning sips of wine, she finds herself entangled with three strangers claiming to be time travelers.

programme.title: GONE
programme.desc: When an architect makes a hugely consequential error on a building site, his attempted cover up becomes the least of his problems.

programme.title: Chasing Lines
programme.desc: A subconscious search of cosmic creativity, a dialogue with Earth.

programme.title: Noddy
programme.desc: Mark has spent the last decade behind politicians nodding and blending in, that is until he is nominated for 'Noddy of the Year'

programme.title: The Last Schnitzel
programme.desc: The president of The Grand Turkish Republic demands a schnitzel from his assistant as a condition to leave the Earth safely before it vanishes.

programme.title: THE NEXT MORNING
programme.desc: When Damien attends a family wedding, he has no place to sleep and guests who ignore him. To find his place in life, Damien can only count on himself.

programme.title: EAT ME!
programme.desc: An airhead beauty is transformed by her vision of singing and dancing food, and forced to revaluate her attitude towards it.

programme.title: Coelacanth
programme.desc: Bob finds himself stuck in the countryside after burying his wife, where he is forced to be taken in by Dave, who wants nothing to do with him.

programme.title: Hymn of Hate
programme.desc: Set in No Man's Land at The Somme during WW1, this is a poignant and still relevant story for our times.

programme.title: MY BOYFRIEND'S DAUGHTER
programme.desc: When a young woman's much older boyfriend refuses to introduce her to his daughter, she decides to take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: JUMP
programme.desc: A middle-aged party clown gets to grips with the failure to achieve his dreams.

programme.title: THE FISHERMAN
programme.desc: A humble Cuban fisherman must catch a fish tonight despite harsh conditions, for the sake of his family and against all odds.

programme.title: Transitional Seasons (Mezze Stagioni)
programme.desc: The story of one young couple through time as we see them in different phases of life.

programme.title: Between Us
programme.desc: Sonia invites Alonso to her apartment for what it appears to be a casual date but as the conversation evolves, their true history unravels.

programme.title: Girl Moves Out of Her Town to Live with Boy in His
programme.desc: A couple that lacks the proper communication skills are left with only their perceptions of each other.

programme.title: The Patters
programme.desc: Dominique feels obliged to visit her estranged father, during the visit the reasons for her absence become apparent.

programme.title: THE VAN
programme.desc: A young man fights to able to pay his way out of Albania and hopefully take his father with him.

programme.title: THE MAN IN THE BOX
programme.desc: Locked up in a maximum security prison, an old man tries to revive his glory days as a magician, devising a perfect yet dangerous escape plan.

programme.title: TREACLE
programme.desc: When friends Jessie and Belle go away for the weekend and drunkenly hook up, their friendship is put to the test in the aftermath.

programme.title: Unspoken War
programme.desc: This film paints a picture of how the over consumption and wastage of seafood has resulted in the world through a micro fishing community in the Country of Cambodia

programme.title: Killing Thyme
programme.desc: Little Sam befriends grumpy old Norman, a man with a neglected allotment and a death wish.

programme.title: THE STAINED CLUB
programme.desc: Finn has stains on his skin. He meets a group of cool kids with different stains on their bodies. A story about friendship, parents and loneliness.

programme.title: Birdlime
programme.desc: A wild bird gets trapped in a cage surrounded by unfamiliar sounds and un-birdlike creatures.

programme.title: Inside My Mind
programme.desc: Four friends holiday in a mountain chalet, but Michael is having scary visions that he cannot explain.

programme.title: Louie - Season 2 - Episodes 25-27
programme.desc: Louie, Draw Me a Dinosaur Louie, Draw Me a Flamingo Louie, Draw Me a Pirate Ship Have you ever dreamed of exploring an island or travelling to the moon? Do you yearn to race cars or talk to friendly bears? No problem! Everything is possible with Louie! With his and Yoko´s help, you´ll learn how to draw while having fun!

programme.title: Heidi - Season 1 - Save Chippy
programme.desc: A few days later, Heidi saves a goldfinch from a jackdaw’s attack but the goldfinch is wounded. Against Grandfather’s advice, Heidi decides to save the wounded bird and she needs Peter’s help for that. At his place, Peter is gone for the day in the woods and Heidi meets Peter’s Grandmother, an old and blind woman. She tells Heidi she can save the bird with Artemisia, a mountain herb.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: A shadow hangs over the meadow and the beehive: it comes from an unidentified object perched on a tree in the meadow. Everyone is afraid and remains stashed … Maya, courageous, wants to be sure this is a real danger.

programme.title: Car City Universe - Car City: Amber the Ambulance - Hot and Dizzy
programme.desc: Carl got dizzy coming down his curly slide and bumped himself. Amber comes and diagnoses the problem with a thermometer (he’s overheated after helping Frank put out a fire). Amber treats him with syrup and cools him with a fan. To finish, she puts a plaster over his small injury.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - The Plot
programme.desc: Maya and Willy discover a diary. It belongs to Beeswax and reading it, the two little bees understand that the prime minister is planning something big for the Queen and the hive. Maya is sure: it’s a coup plot. Maya and Willy want to warn the Queen. But are they right? Is it really a coup?

programme.title: Heidi - Season 1 - A Night out
programme.desc: After Peter tells her how much he hates school and how unbearable it is, Heidi is scared that Grandfather will force her to go to school next winter. At the same time, Grandfather receives a letter from Dete saying that she’ll come back next spring to take Heidi away. Grandfather is upset and clams up when Heidi asks him if she’ll have to go to school.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Triple Trouble
programme.desc: The triplets Zip, Zap and Zoe do not stop shouting "wolf" when there is no danger. Maya has had enough of it… An adventure with Maya will teach the triplets it is not fun to scare others without a reason.

programme.title: Bugged - Season 1 - Episodes 43-45
programme.desc: Absolute zero Pester wontrol Handicapped Follow our hero Murphy in his doomed quest to capture the ultimate prize: a bug called Puck. But, for Murphy, nothing ever works the way it should and he has big competition: Blat Jack, a super bounty hunter. Everything that can go wrong will go wrong! Relive the glory days of burlesque cartoons!

programme.title: Mia and me - Season 2 - The Spell of the Green Fluids
programme.desc: Franca visits her grandson Mario at Renzo’s farm, preparing dinner for all of them, when suddenly the bank manager shows up again, accompanied by a surveyor. Pretending to call Paula, Mia disappears to Centopia. There Rixel and Gargona pay a visit to Polytheus who tells them about a secret tunnel leading into the Elven Crater and handing them two devices that might help them finding this tunnel.

programme.title: Louie - Season 2 - Épisodes 4-6
programme.desc: Louie, Draw Me a Scarecrow Louie, Draw Me a Parrot Louie, Draw Me a Giraffe Have you ever dreamed of exploring an island or travelling to the moon?
